sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52331" key="kako/rrupos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰκό-ρρῠπος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n52331.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">filthy</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0096.tlg002:73" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aesop.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">73</biblScope> </bibl> (= <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0614.tlg001:10:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Babr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.1</biblScope> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
